title: HBAD-555 The desire of men who can not be suppressed by the aching body prior to her husband, the widow's flesh secret dyed in pale pink - Maya Takeuchi
description: Yuri Sasahara, Mio Kimijima, Yuri Eto, Maya Takeuchi, Ah Hiiragi, and Mori Hotaru perform enthusiastically as a widow in mourning before her husband. A distorted shadow of lust creeping on a widow immersed in memories with her husband. White skin that spills through the gaps in mourning clothes. Women who turn from days unrelated to pleasure and drown in lust in front of the deceased ... Excited by the bewitching appearance that devours a hot meat stick with all one's heart.
